name: elamachan-frontend
description: ElaMachan frontend (Next.js 15, App Router, TypeScript). App scaffold lands in a follow-up issue.

scripts.lint: echo "(placeholder) no lint configured yet — replaced when the Next.js app is scaffolded"
scripts.build: echo "(placeholder) no build configured yet — replaced when the Next.js app is scaffolded"
